title: Sous-vide Crispy German Chuck Roast
description: A floral and light German dish featuring a nut-free-friendly sous-vide cooked chuck roast for a brunch-mood meal.

ingredients.name: Flour
ingredients.notes: For dusting the roast and seasoning

ingredients.name: Paprika (Spanish)
ingredients.notes: For seasoning the roast and adding a touch of floral note

instructions: Spray a sous-vide bag with vegetable oil and place the chuck roast inside, making sure it's coated evenly.
In another bowl, mix flour and paprika. Toss the roast in the mixture until covered entirely.
Place the seasoned roast into the preheated sous-vide machine and cook for 12 hours on low (low temp is approximately 135°F or 57°C).
After cooking, remove the roast from the bag and place it on a cutting board. Allow to rest for at least 10 minutes.
To serve, slice the roast thinly against the grain over a plate lined with parchment paper, allowing any excess juices to drip off naturally.
